---
title: "Session 11 teaching notes: Python 8"
session_id: session-11
event_id: null
---

## Session 11 — Pandas automation and web APIs

Note: Klausur: Pandas-Teil ist "Pure pandas" (keine Kombination mit Python)

Alpha Vantage keys: PR shares them later.

JSON: relevance (apps, ...)

API examples: depending on remaining time.

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise                    | Summary                                                                                                                                   | Files                       | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------- | -------------------- |
|     143 | Stock-market API            | Retrieve Mercedes-Benz data through an API, plot closing prices, and calculate and visualize high/low returns.                            | `MercedesBenz1.py`          |                      |
|     148 | Stock-price collection      | Retrieve evening closing prices for four stocks and append them with the date to a persistent CSV file.                                   | `Stocks.py`<br>`Stocks.csv` |                      |
|     152 | JSON data retrieval         | Rewrite the Mercedes-Benz exercise to process the API response as JSON.                                                                   | `MercedesBenz2.py`          |                      |
|     155 | Cryptocurrency API analysis | Retrieve Bitcoin and Ethereum prices, convert timestamps, calculate returns, variances, and correlation, and visualize the return series. | `Cryptocurrencies.py`       |                      |
|     159 | Weather API                 | Configure an Open-Meteo forecast, retrieve it through the API, and process the resulting weather data.                                    | —                           |                      |

<!--
    ## Session overview

    - **Focus:** Python
    - **Session title:** Python 1
    - **Coverage target:** Until **Accessing data**

    ## Before class

    - [ ] Review the session slides/materials.
    - [ ] Prepare files, datasets, and examples.
    - [ ] Note any announcements or reminders.

    ## Timing record

    Use this table while preparing or after teaching to record the actual timing.

    | Planned time | Actual time | Topic/activity | Notes for next time |
    |---|---|---|---|
    | 0--10 min |  | Setup / recap |  |
    | 10--30 min |  | Main input |  |
    | 30--60 min |  | Guided practice |  |
    | 60--80 min |  | Independent practice / questions |  |
    | 80--90 min |  | Wrap-up |  |

    ## Notes during class

    - TBD

    ## Follow-up

    - [ ] Update examples or instructions.
    - [ ] Record common questions.
    - [ ] Add reminders for the next session.
-->
